codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex exec blocked by pretool-bash-safety.sh (bulk-commit-sentinel-write guard): the shell variable assignment PROMPT='...' containing the substring 'write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py' in a compound bash statement triggered the sentinel-path compound-command guard. The hook rejected the invocation before codex ran. This is a false-positive on prompt content — the command was not actually invoking the sentinel writer — but the hook has no way to distinguish string-in-prompt from string-as-command. Error: BLOCKED: bulk-commit-sentinel-write.
